2265080.name: Hands of Victory
2265080.description:
Use every trick up your sleeve to outwit, outplay and ultimately outscore cunning opponents in the most cut-throat poker showdown ever. 

Play, level-up and rank with multiple playable characters  - each with their own unique playing style and game-affecting skills.

Do you prefer dominating your opponents with an outsized stack of chips? Are you a card reading wizard? Or is rigging the deck more your style?

Whatever you select, a unique scoring system makes every move you make count. Score points by making great laydowns, successfully bluffing,  playing aggressively, eliminating opponents and much more. 

Once you feel ready to fling some cards on the felt of battle, participate in various tournament formats where you win or lose depending on your accumulated score over multiple games. 

Unlike other F2P poker games, Hands of Victory is not monetized using virtual coins. You cannot buy your way to success.
